releaseNotes:
Bug Fixes
• Text display issue (formatting) - Some users with a large device text size were experiencing hidden/cut-off text in the app.
 → The device text size setting will no longer affect the app. All users will now see all text correctly regardless of their device font size.
• Filtered ships reappearing - Ships that were filtered out were incorrectly reappearing when opening a detail page. This edge case will be fixed in next version
• Special characters in ship names - Ships with special characters (e.g. Mike O'Leary) can now be searched and found correctly in the mobile app.

New Feature
• Coordinate format in unit settings - Users will be able to update coordinate formats directly in the units bottom sheet, choosing between DD, DDM, or DMS
description:
Welcome to MarineTraffic. 
 
You spoke, we listened. Based on feedback from our customers, the MarineTraffic app has been updated to deliver a faster, clearer, and more reliable way to track vessels and monitor maritime activity worldwide. 

MarineTraffic is used by maritime professionals, shipping companies, port authorities, and enthusiasts around the world. With MarineTraffic 2.0, the experience you rely on has been improved, while keeping the core tools you already know and trust. 

If you’ve used MarineTraffic before, you’ll feel at home straight away. The main features remain familiar, now supported by better performance, clearer maps, and a more stable foundation built for the future. 

 

With MarineTraffic, you can: 

Track vessels live worldwide using AIS data 

View ship positions, movements, and voyage history with key events along the route 

Build and monitor your chosen fleet by following specific vessels 

Access detailed vessel information such as type, destination, speed, and course 

Explore enhanced maps with close weather monitoring, including wind conditions 

 

A unified MarineTraffic experience 

The new MarineTraffic brings core tools together into one unified mobile app experience. The new app focuses on clarity, reliability, and ease of use, improving performance while keeping the experience familiar. 

Maps load faster, interactions feel smoother, and information is presented more clearly, supporting both everyday use and professional maritime workflows. 

 

What’s improved in MarineTraffic: 

Faster performance across maps and weather views 

Clearer visuals and smoother interactions throughout the app 

Improved platform stability and reliability 

All your key tools in one app, including close weather monitoring 

 

Unlock more with the Mobile Pro Plan 

The Mobile Pro Plan brings advanced capabilities together for users who need deeper visibility and extended coverage. 

With Mobile Pro, you can: 

Track vessels beyond coastal coverage using Satellite AIS, including activity in open oceans 

Access advanced fleet monitoring tools for wider oversight 

Follow vessels with extended historical data and deeper insights 

Gain access to additional maritime data layers for professional use 

Mobile Pro expands your vessel tracking capabilities when standard AIS coverage is not enough. 

Mobile Pro is designed for users who need a broader, more complete view of global vessel movement. 

 

Designed for real-world use 

MarineTraffic is used in many different ways, from fleet management to vessel tracking. MarineTraffic is designed to support these use cases without adding unnecessary complexity. 

You can follow vessels and fleets important to you, set up alerts, and explore global vessel traffic in real time. Vessel details, voyage history, and close weather monitoring are accessible in one place, helping you stay informed without switching between tools. 

 

MarineTraffic builds on everything users already rely on, with a faster, clearer, and more dependable mobile experience designed to support maritime activity around the world. 

Download MarineTraffic to explore global vessel traffic with improved speed, clarity, and reliability.
